urdu transliteration text:
PAR BAADE SHAHEDIN YE AJAB SAANEHAA GUZRAA
Yet, soon after Hussain's martyrdom a tragedy happened
KHAIMOn KI TARAF SHEH KE BAD-HAA LASHKARE AADAA
english translation text: Toward the tents marched the army of oppressors

urdu transliteration text:
BAAQI NA RAHAA ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
Alas, the broken hearted Zainab's veil was not spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
